properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v3 v2 v3 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When You found me My whole world changed I'm redeemed by Your life Let the earth see You are freedom Turn my darkness to light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You welcome me in With open arms Into unending light

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm not ashamed of the gospel Lord Your power, your love You saved my soul Now I'm alive in You I live in the risen Son

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm not ashamed of the gospel Lord Your power, your love You saved my soul Now I'm alive in You I live in the risen Son I live in the risen Son I live in the risen Son I live in the risen Son, yeah
